title: P4: codereview finding in edhoc.rs A_3 construction
description: Duplicated code for building A_3 (the Encrypt0 structure with TH_3 || CRED ext_aad) in process_message_2 (initiator) and process_message_3 (responder). Extract to helper fn build_a3_aad(th3, cred) to ensure identical AAD in both directions and simplify unit testing. This is real work per workflow rule even if P4.
close_reason: Extracted build_a3 helper, updated both call sites, added unit test for A_3 construction matching Python CBOR. Fixed clippy empty_line_after_doc_comments (P4 treated as real). 3 clean passes (clippy+test) with no new findings. Main bead q75x ready for closure after reviews.
